feed.title: App Store Discounts（US）
feed.subtitle: App Store Discounts - Made with love by appstore-discounts(https://github.com/appstore-discounts/appstore-discounts) feedId:49753370488353792+userId:73658201673997312 feedId:157008699750812672+userId:73658201673997312

entry.title: 🎉 Welcome to subscribe to App Store Discounts
entry.summary: Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!
entry.content:
Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!

About our RSS feed

  • Focused on delivering App Store app discount information
  • Whenever an app's price drops or in-app purchases go on sale, we will promptly send you a notification
  • Each app's discount information is presented in a separate feed
  • The RSS feed is completely open-source, allowing you to view, contribute, and add your favorite apps at any time

Find Us

App Store Discounts

Finally

If this project has been helpful to you, would you kindly give us a ⭐️

entry.title: Statistical Data Report
entry.content:
Country or Region Tracked

  1. Mainland China(CN)
  2. Hong Kong, China(HK)
  3. Macao, China(MO)
  4. Taiwan, China(TW)
  5. United States(US)
  6. Türkiye(TR)
  7. Portugal(PT)

Statistics of the Number of App Tracked

Category Total Apps Artificially Added Automatically Added Prohibit Push
All 1789 201 1588 79
US 1652 176 1476 63

Ranking of App Discounts This Month(US)

Since it supports applications that automatically add tracking based on paid application rankings, most applications are now automatically added, and the quality of the application is unknown and uncontrollable. The current ranking will be used as a reference for subsequent disabling push.

entry.title: Onyx Magic
entry.content:
Discount Information

In-App Purchases

  • 100 Onyx Credits：$24.99 → $19.99 [$19.99 ~ $24.99]

All Price Information

Price：$64.99

In-App Purchases

  • 100 Onyx Credits：$19.99

Application Description

Onyx is a revolutionary new utility that allows you to modify a captured image in real-time using variable input data. Using cutting edge AI processing, Onyx lets you remotely create seamless alterations to photos moments after they've been taken - all with your spectator's camera. For example: — Make a playing card appear in your spectator's wallet. — Morph your spectator's shadow to look like their thought of animal. — Take a photo of your spectator holding a signed card. They name *any* other card. The signed card in the photo transforms to match their thought. — Supplement your Gypsy Queen routine with Onyx, allowing you to zoom in on a photo of your spectator holding the Queen of Hearts for the reveal. — Reveal a thought-of word, name, or initials hidden naturally in the light reflections of a spectator's eye. — Change the time on a photo of a clock. — Remove your spectator's wristwatch in a photo, making it seem that it was removed earlier. ...and more! If you can describe it, Onyx can likely create it. Onyx is particularly great for a reveal within something ephemeral. Take a photo of someone's shadow, a landscape shot of the clouds, a flicker on a TV screen or more, and Onyx will realistically insert their free choice. * Variable Delayed Input Inspired by the popular variable trigger system featured in DFB X, Onyx pauses and automatically waits for input, letting you remotely modify a photo *after* it's been taken. * Cutting Edge Technology Take a photo, then have your spectator make a free choice. Onyx's advanced technology seamlessly transforms the photo remotely. * Create Unlimited Effects Change signed playing cards, reveal initials and names, or modify writing. Reveal *anything you can imagine* within a genuine photo you just took. * Your Integrations. Their Camera The effect happens entirely with the spectator's camera. With Onyx's powerful integrations, your phone never needs to leave your pocket. * Invisible, Advanced Technology As only the spectator's device is in play, Onyx's advanced technology remains hidden and inconspicuous. * Third Party Integrations Use your favourite magic apps' input methods, including: — Earworm's covert typing Web Search & Notes input — Native voice input — WebFX's Wrist Gestures — WikiTest — PeekSmith — Bridge ...and any compatible third-party app. Onyx is a tool specifically designed for entertainment purposes. It uses purchaseable in-app credits or a funded OpenRouter account for best-in-class automatic edits. Onyx supports: Arabic, Bengali, Bulgarian, Chinese simplified and traditional, Croatian, Czech, Danish, Dutch, English, Estonian, Finnish, French, German, Greek, Hebrew, Hindi, Hungarian, Indonesian, Italian, Japanese, Korean, Latvian, Lithuanian, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese, Romanian, Russian, Serbian, Slovak, Slovenian, Spanish, Swahili, Swedish, Thai, Turkish, Ukrainian, Vietnamese

entry.title: Shot Tracer
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$12.99 → $5.99 [$5.99 ~ $12.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$5.99

In-App Purchases

  • Map Subscription：$1.99
  • Map Tracer & Video Editor Monthly：$9.99
  • Map Tracer & Video Editor Annual：$59.99
  • Map Tracer & Video Editor Half-Year：$34.99

Application Description

Shot Tracer ® 3D Map Tracer Putt Reading Golf Video Editor Augmented Reality Scorecard Track your golf shots like on TV and turn every swing into stunning content. Shot Tracer® is the ultimate golf tracer, ball flight tracker, and golf video editor, trusted by golfers worldwide and voted Best Golf App by Golf Digest and Golf Magazine. Relive your rounds on a database of 44,000+ 3D golf courses, improve your putting, and create professional-quality golf videos, all on your iPhone and iPad Shot Tracer ® Realistic golf ball flight editor Animate carry, distance, and shot shapes Works on any course, no special hardware required 3D Map Tracer & Course Flyovers Birds eye view of your shots on 45,000+ golf courses Create hole flyovers and shot replays Showcase strategy and shot placement Golf Video Editor (NEW) Create and edit pro-level golf videos directly on your iPhone and iPad Broadcast-style custom scoreboard editor Voice overlays with automatic captions Add custom text, images, and graphics and much more! Professional Scorecard Editor Built-in database with 44,000+ golf course scorecards worldwide Dozens of pro animated scorecard designs ready in seconds Full customization with our new advanced scorecard animation editor AR Green Reading & Putt Line (NEW) Bring broadcast LIV Line technology to your game. Augmented-reality green reading Visual putt lines to understand slope and break Improve putting confidence and green reading skills AR Tracer Fun Mode (NEW) Create fun, engaging golf content with augmented reality. Hit targets, hoops, and challenges Shoot down UFOs in AR Perfect for creative social media clips More Golf Tools Digital scorecard & scoreboard editor 44 000 golf course scorecard database Works on iPhone & iPad Designed for golfers of all skill levels Terms of use: https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Way of the Hunter Wild America
entry.id: Way of the Hunter Wild America-us-1772083342057
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$9.99 → $6.99 [$4.99 ~ $9.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$6.99

In-App Purchases

  • Steyr Arms Pack：$2.99
  • Hunter's Pack：$1.99

Application Description

Enjoy the first entry of the Way of the Hunter mobile series set in the beautiful North American Pacific Northwest. This authentic hunting experience lets you explore and hunt in large open-world environments in the Nez Perce Valleys, USA. Discover true-to-life animals in beautiful natural habitats and handle various detailed and highly realistic weapons. Way of the Hunter provides a highly immersive, completely integrated experience amongst stunning wildlife with true-to-live animal group behavior. Witness the changing of complex ecosystems that react and adapt to your input. Learn what it means to be a true hunter and put your skills to the test. Face the challenges of ethical hunting, supported by a compelling story, or simply enjoy hunting in rich environments freely. * Dozens of strikingly detailed animal species with realistic behavior models for a genuinely immersive hunting experience * Hunt like a pro with features that highlight animal signs, blood splatter analysis, and shot review with the rewindable bullet camera * Use Hunter Sense to highlight important details and information or deactivate it * Complex Trophy system generates unique antlers and horns based on multiple factors like fitness and age * Sophisticated natural animal animations and reactions when sensing the player's presence * 24-hour day/night cycle with changing wind and weather * Realistic ballistics and bullet physics simulation * A broad selection of firearms and equipment, including licensed gear from Bushnell, Federal, Leupold, Primos, Remington, and Steyr Arms * An in-game economy that lets you hunt game and sell the meat to purchase new gear, hunting passes, and taxidermy for your trophy stands * A compelling story about the struggles of a family hunting business and the rivalry and friendships that surround it * Intuitive photo mode for capturing and sharing your favorite moments * Stalk your prey with a gamepad or touch controls * Optimized mobile controls for comfort and efficiency WARNING: Devices with less than 4 GB of RAM are not supported! You need a device with at least 6 GB of RAM to use the highest graphics settings. Imprint: http://www.handy-games.com/contact/ © www.handy-games.com GmbH

entry.title: 真武三国 英雄集结
entry.id: 真武三国 英雄集结-us-1772083342057
entry.content:
Discount Information

In-App Purchases

  • SP武将碎片：$39.99 → $3.99 [$3.99 ~ $39.99]

All Price Information

Price：$0.29

In-App Purchases

  • 心愿礼包：$5.99
  • 聚财盆：$2.99
  • 节日礼包：$3.99
  • SP武将碎片：$3.99
  • 新手成长礼包：$0.99
  • 节日大礼包：$29.99
  • 超值月卡：$3.99
  • 新手成长大礼包：$3.99
  • 豪华月卡：$9.99
  • 犒赏令：$9.99

Application Description

游戏特色： 1）Q版水墨风！ 角色，场景，UI均采用中国古典水墨风格，高端大气上档次，低调奢华有内涵。 2）百名武将，绝无雷同！ 超过一百位绝无雷同的武将和技能，考验英雄组合，操作和策略。 3）合体技系统！ 痛快淋漓的合体技系统，简单刺激的触发方式，给您前所未有的战斗体验。 4）六大职业系统！ 六大职业，五大势力，职业定位更加明确，玩法更加多变。 5）九大模式！ 战役，挑战，竞赛，无双，奇境，试炼，八阵，领地，袭击九大创新模式，等您来战。 ※ 如有任何问题和建议，可通过以下方式联系我们，我们一定尽快给您答复！祝您游戏愉快！ QQ交流群1：9222266 QQ交流群2：758352295 QQ交流群3：203399926 微信公众账号：oneonegames

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Auto Redial App
entry.content:
Discount Information

In-App Purchases

  • Weekly Subscription：$1.99 → $0.99 [$0.99 ~ $2.99]
  • Yearly Subscription：$24.99 → $9.99 [$9.99 ~ $24.99]

All Price Information

Price：Free

In-App Purchases

  • Pro – Lifetime：$0.00
  • Weekly Subscription：$0.99
  • Yearly Subscription：$9.99

Application Description

With this application, you can make automatic calls to the numbers you want efficiently and in a personalized way. You can define the number of repetitions, the interval between calls, add an extension, activate vibration before dialing, and even schedule your calls using a built-in calendar. Auto Redial App also offers a simple and intuitive interface, detailed call history, and multiple customization options to fit your needs. This application is ideal for anyone who needs to make repetitive calls automatically — such as an appointment call, a busy call retry, or contacting services where the line is busy. Main Features: - Automatically redial busy or unanswered calls. - Set number of retries and time intervals. - Schedule calls in advance via calendar. - Add extensions automatically after dialing. - Enable vibration before each redial. - Call history and retry stats. Perfect for: - Booking appointments (doctors, embassies, etc.) - Customer service or tech support - Calling public offices - Freelancers and business owners following up clients Whether you’re calling to book a doctor’s appointment, reach customer service, or just trying to connect when the line is busy, this app saves time and frustration.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: All In One Memo
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$3.99 → Free [Free ~ $3.99]）

All Price Information

Price：Free

Application Description

Keep the words, pictures, videos, voice and positions you want to record at any time and anywhere. And there are reminders that you can never forget.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

entry.title: 玄易-专业天时子平八字排盘六爻占卜风水罗盘
entry.id: 玄易-专业天时子平八字排盘六爻占卜风水罗盘-us-1771917031691
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$0.99 → Free [Free ~ $0.99]）

All Price Information

Price：Free

In-App Purchases

  • 月卡会员：$4.99
  • 年卡会员：$12.99

Application Description

玄易—專業八字排盤與命理分析工具 玄易是一款功能強大且便捷的八字排盤工具，專為不同需求的用戶量身打造。無論您是八字命理的初學者，還是經驗豐富的命理師，我們都能為您提供精準、專業的命理分析，助您洞悉人生軌跡。 核心功能： 精準八字排盤：輸入生辰，即可一鍵排盤，精準呈現命局資訊，助您快速解讀八字奧秘。 專業斷法知識：內建豐富的八字斷法與解析技巧，幫助您深入理解命理學，提升預測能力。 多盤同批分析：支援同時解析多個命盤，輕鬆對比命理特徵，助力更全面的推斷與研究。 日曆查詢與節氣資訊：整合日曆查詢功能，可查看日干支、節氣變換等重要資訊，精準輔助命理分析。 簡潔直觀，易學易用：優化介面設計，讓複雜的八字分析變得清晰易懂，即使是新手也能快速上手。 為何選擇玄易八字？ 專業精準——演算法嚴謹，數據可靠，助您深度解讀八字奧秘。 學習提升——內建命理知識，幫助初學者快速入門，高手進階提升。 洞察人生——解讀事業、財運、婚姻等多方面命理資訊，把握人生機遇。 玄易讓八字命理觸手可及，助您探索人生玄機！ 立即下載，開啟您的命理探索之旅！

Application Screenshot

iPhone

entry.title: Thumper: Pocket Edition
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$4.99 → $3.99 [$0.99 ~ $4.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$3.99

Application Description

*** Winner of Apple Design Award 2019 *** Thumper is rhythm violence: classic action, blistering speed, and brutal physicality. You are a space beetle. Brave the void and confront a maniacal giant head. With this special pocket edition, you can play all nine epic levels with one hand. Hurtle forward, master new moves, and survive terrifying boss battles. Propelled by a pounding original soundtrack, you'll feel every crushing impact. To reach synesthetic bliss, you must conquer rhythm hell. ■ Features ■ ・ Nine epic levels ・ Adrenalizing boss battles ・ Psychedelic visuals and original soundtrack ・ Smooth 60 FPS in portrait and landscape (and up to 120 FPS on supported devices) ・ PLAY + mode (increased challenge and speed) ・ Full screen display on iPhone X ・ iCloud Sync ■ Please Note ■ Wireless headphones can add significant audio latency. For the best experience, wired headphones or integrated speakers are strongly recommended.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Astrea: Six-Sided Oracles
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$9.99 → $6.99 [$6.99 ~ $9.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$6.99

Application Description

Astrea is a DICE-deck-building roguelike that flips the script on deckbuilders by using dice instead of cards and an unique dual “damage” system: Purification vs Corruption. Features • Unique dual “damage” system: Purification vs Corruption - In Astrea there is a new type of “damage” system. Purification can be used to damage enemies or heal yourself. On the other hand, corruption can be used to damage yourself or heal the enemies. Pacify enemies through Purification, or Corrupt yourself to unleash abilities that help tip the scales. • Dynamic Health Bar system - With skills attached to your health bar, you can take Corruption to enable these skills and unleash powerful abilities. But be careful, if you take too much Corruption you will be consumed by it. • Not cards, but dice! - Build a dice pool that fits your playstyle. Choose from over 350 dice and three dice types; reliably safe, perfectly balanced, or powerfully risky. A dice type system designed with high-risk, high-reward in its core. • Customize your dice - Forge your fate by editing die faces with new actions, tipping the odds of powerful results into your favor. • Choose from Six Brave Oracles - Each possessing their own unique dice sets, abilities, and playstyles. From ingenious spellcasters to brutish berserkers, whether you like beating the opponent into submission or outsmarting them with clever plays, there’s an oracle for you. • Uncover over 170 modifying Blessings - Imbue your Oracle with unique passives yielding potent effects that changes up your fundamental tactics. Choose between Star Blessings, passive effects with lower power, or Black Hole Blessings, powerful passive effects with a drawback.
